title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
